ogTitle: Sellicks Hill vs Semaphore Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sellicks Hill and Semaphore Park.
heading: Sellicks Hill vs Semaphore Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sellicks Hill, South Australia and Semaphore Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Semaphore Park has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Sellicks Hill (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sellicks Hill or Semaphore Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sellicks Hill has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Semaphore Park scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sellicks Hill scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Semaphore Park scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sellicks Hill or Semaphore Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Semaphore Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
